narrative:
Trenton 5 (precinct in Butler County) has 558 registered voters, with 69.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
